variants: Travis Hamilton currently resides in Goldspur Crest, where he works at Elm Ridge Gaming, applying his talent for game design. He grew up in Amberpetal Crossing and attended Heroncrest Technology Institute to further his education. His dedication to the industry earned him the Ivory Spire Certification, a recognition of his expertise and skills. As a professional in the gaming field, Travis continues to push the boundaries of creativity and technology.
